name: Swedish Fruit Compote
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean all berries separately. Pick over and discard inferior berries.
2. Hull strawberries, cutting the larger ones in half. Set all berries aside in separate bowls.
3. In a medium saucepan, combine apple-juice concentrate, water, and maple syrup.
4. In a small bowl, stir potato or cornstarch with 1/4 cup of the apple-juice mixture.
5. Add the starch back to the pan and bring the mixture to a simmer (it will be cloudy at first).
6. Cook until the mixture turns clear and transparent.
7. Carefully stir in blackberries and strawberries, then remove from heat.
8. Refrigerate and let cool completely.
9. Gently stir in raspberries.
10. Serve in goblets or large wine glasses and garnish each portion with a sprig of mint.
